clear_first.label: Clear existing cookies first
clear_first.description: When enabled, all cookies for the current site are removed before the new ones are applied.

custom_path.label: Use custom path by default
custom_path.description: When enabled, the path from the current page URL is pre-filled instead of using /.

input.placeholder: Update cookies with a cookie header, e.g. foo=bar; bat=baz; oof=rab
